title: AuditSegmentSeal
description: Protocol-owned segment-seal payload family for signed sidecar evidence over sealed audit-event segments.

segmentCutWindow.description: Explicit MVP segment-cut window policy used by auditd for this sealed segment.

ownership_scope.description: Authoritative ledger ownership scope for this segment-cut policy; per-run ownership is forbidden.

max_segment_bytes.description: Configured byte window for cutting this segment, measured over raw framed segment bytes.

max_segment_duration_seconds.description: Configured time window for cutting this segment in wall-clock seconds.

cut_trigger.description: Deterministic trigger that caused this segment to be cut.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for audit segment seals.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this audit segment seal payload.

segment_id.description: Stable segment identifier emitted by auditd for the sealed segment.

sealed_after_state.description: Seals are emitted only after a previously open segment is closed.

segment_state.description: Lifecycle posture encoded by this seal sidecar evidence object.

segment_cut.description: Explicit size/time window policy used to cut this segment in the instance-global ledger.

event_count.description: Number of signed AuditEvent envelopes included in the sealed segment.

first_record_digest.description: Digest of the first signed AuditEvent envelope in append order for the sealed segment.

last_record_digest.description: Digest of the last signed AuditEvent envelope in append order for the sealed segment.

merkle_profile.description: Pinned ordered-Merkle profile over append-ordered signed-record digests using domain-separated leaf/internal-node hashing.

merkle_root.description: Ordered Merkle root over the segment's signed AuditEvent envelope digests.

segment_file_hash_scope.description: Pinned hash scope requiring segment_file_hash to cover exact raw framed segment bytes.

segment_file_hash.description: Exact hash over raw framed segment-file bytes.

seal_chain_index.description: Zero-based linear position in the local segment-seal chain.

previous_seal_digest.description: Digest of the previous signed AuditSegmentSeal envelope for linear seal chaining.

anchoring_subject.description: Explicit anchoring target contract; anchor receipts bind to signed AuditSegmentSeal envelopes.

sealed_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp for when auditd sealed this segment.

protocol_bundle_manifest_hash.description: Hash binding for the protocol bundle manifest used when the seal was produced.

seal_reason.description: Machine-consumed reason code describing why the segment was cut and sealed.
